rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow individual counsellors to maintain contact with all individual students and their parents.
The system shall simplify the process and minimize manual paperwork.
The system shall automate the manual process, converting it into a fully computerized system.
The system shall design and implement a system for rationalizing admissions to specific courses within universities or institutions.
The system shall enable students to register for counselling services if they meet the eligibility criteria.
The system shall provide students with information about colleges and universities where they can apply, based on their qualifications.
The system shall generate reports based on the student's merit list.
The system shall maintain a record of counselling procedures and activities.
The system shall publish the results of counselling services and other relevant information.
The system shall provide students with information about available seats within the institution, including booked and vacant seats.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow individual counsellors to remain in contact with all individual students as well as parents.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: counselling is an important aspect for the students of the current technological generation as an individual counsellor may remain in contact with all individual students as well as parents.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Simplify the process and reduce manual paperwork.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Student Counselling Management System will simplify the process and reduce the manual paperwork.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Automate the manual process to a computerized system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: making complete atomization of manual process to computerized system

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Design a system to rationalize admission to particular courses in a university/institution.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The main objective of the Student Counselling Management System is to design a system to rationalize the admission to particular courses in a university/institution.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow students to register for counselling if they are eligible.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Through this system, the student will be able to register for counselling if he is eligible.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide information regarding colleges and universities where a student can apply.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the student is qualifying the criteria then he will get the information regarding the colleges and the universities in which he can apply.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Generate reports based on student's merit list.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: report generation based on student’s merit list

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide information regarding available seats in the institution.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A student can also get the information regarding how many seats have been booked and vacant seats available in the institution (Figures 29.1–29.8)
